html:
Exclusive to:

The Poison Spear is a craftable Weapon exclusive to the Shipwrecked DLC. It does the same damage as a Spear and Poisons the target on hit.

Poisoned enemies move slower, attack less often, and deal less damage. However, the food items that drop from poisoned enemies will have their freshness reduced to 50%.

Tips

  • The Poison Spear is a useful melee weapon in killing Prime Apes as it slows their movement speed on each hit.
  • Because of its ability to slow down and weaken enemies, this weapon is excellent against Bosses like the Tiger Shark; or in Reign of Giants linked worlds, against the Dragonfly due to her fast attack period, making it safer to land a hit and kite while she's poisoned.
  • Loaded into a Spear Gun, the Poison Spear makes a great first strike against a Blue Whale/White Whale. The spoilage penalty on loot will not apply and the whale will move and attack much slower.
  • The Sealnado is not affected by Poison.

Trivia

Old icon.
  • Prior to the Hang Ten update, the Poison Spear's icon looked just like a regular Spear with its tip being green.
  • Like in every other case, crafting does not consider durability of an item, making a 1% Spear just as good as a 100% one, effectively letting the player use a spear almost twice as long.
Tools and WeaponsCraftable Items

“Now it's extra deadly.”
–Wilson

–Willow

–Wolfgang

–Wendy
“TOXIN DELIVERY SYSTEM”
–WX-78
“Now I can administer a toxic bite!”
–Wickerbottom
“This spear has a little extra bite.”
–Woodie
“I've made sure it packs an extra wallop.”
–Maxwell
“Luckily the venom gland doesn't weigh down the tip of the spear.”
–Wagstaff
“This spear awards a cöward's victöry.”
–Wigfrid
“One jab'll do ya.”
–Webber
“Want to take a sick day?”
–Walani
“It would make me sick to use this on good meat.”
–Warly
“A coward's weapon.”
–Woodlegs
“'TIS A POKEY STICK O' POISON”
–Wilba
“Sick Stick”
–Wormwood
“Who needs quick deaths when they can be slow and painful?”
–Wheeler
The Poison Spear is a craftable Weapon exclusive to the Shipwrecked DLC. It does the same damage as a Spear and Poisons the target on hit.
Poisoned enemies move slower, attack less often, and deal less damage. However, the food items that drop from poisoned enemies will have their freshness reduced to 50%.
Tips[edit | edit source]
The Poison Spear is a useful melee weapon in killing Prime Apes as it slows their movement speed on each hit.
Because of its ability to slow down and weaken enemies, this weapon is excellent against Bosses like the Tiger Shark; or in Reign of Giants linked worlds, against the Dragonfly due to her fast attack period, making it safer to land a hit and kite while she's poisoned.
Loaded into a Spear Gun, the Poison Spear makes a great first strike against a Blue Whale/White Whale. The spoilage penalty on loot will not apply and the whale will move and attack much slower.
The Sealnado is not affected by Poison.
Trivia[edit | edit source]
Old icon.
Prior to the Hang Ten update, the Poison Spear's icon looked just like a regular Spear with its tip being green.
Like in every other case, crafting does not consider durability of an item, making a 1% Spear just as good as a 100% one, effectively letting the player use a spear almost twice as long.

Tóm tắt

Giáo Độc là một Vũ Khí chế tạo độc quyền trong DLC ​​Shipwrecked. Nó gây sát thương tương tự như Giáo và đầu độc mục tiêu khi trúng đòn.

The '''Poison Spear''' is a craftable [[Weapon]] exclusive to the ''[[Don't Starve: Shipwrecked|Shipwrecked]]'' DLC. It does the same damage as a [[Spear]] and [[Poison]]s the target on hit.

Poisoned enemies move slower, attack less often, and deal less damage. However, the [[food]] [[items]] that drop from poisoned enemies will have their freshness reduced to 50%.

== {{Pic32|Prototype}} Tips ==
* The Poison Spear is a useful melee weapon in killing [[Prime Ape]]s as it slows their movement speed on each hit.
* Because of its ability to slow down and weaken enemies, this weapon is excellent against Bosses like the [[Tiger Shark]]; or in ''[[Reign of Giants]]'' linked worlds, against the [[Dragonfly]] due to her fast attack period, making it safer to land a hit and kite while she's poisoned.
*Loaded into a [[Spear Gun]], the Poison Spear makes a great first strike against a [[Blue Whale]]/[[White Whale]]. The spoilage penalty on loot will not apply and the whale will move and attack much slower.
* The [[Sealnado]] is not affected by Poison.

== {{pic|32|Placeholder}} Trivia ==
[[File:Poison Spear old.png|thumb|right|Old icon.]]
* Prior to the ''[[Don't Starve: Shipwrecked#December 17, 2015 - Hang Ten Update|Hang Ten]]'' update, the Poison Spear's icon looked just like a regular Spear with its tip being green.
* Like in every other case, crafting does not consider durability of an item, making a 1% Spear just as good as a 100% one, effectively letting the player use a spear almost twice as long.
